    363.Minthara: Baldur's Mouth is truly remarkable. I had thought the purpose of a broadsheet was to inform the people, but I see now that I was mistaken.!ORI_Minthara_HasMet_BaldursMouthORI_Minthara_Knows_BaldursMouthPropogandaORI_Minthara_IPRD_BaldursMouthPropoganda

            25.Minthara: I am sure you do. It is a fine thing to build a future with somebody who does not know their past.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0ea854df-ad63-d905-6b4e-a96680e4cfddSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h71b4e381g349eg4903gb9c8g261cb53549dcText UUID: 33613703-ba6e-4bc2-bfeb-8fc56ccc9771Timeline Phase Index: 116Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0ea854df-ad63-d905-6b4e-a96680e4cfddTimeline Phase Duration: 16sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [930.41s-937.81s] | @ 930.66s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [930.41s-937.81s] | @ 930.71s | peanut slot 1 | emotion unchanged | variation 2 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [930.41s-937.81s] | @ 932.82s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [930.41s-937.81s] | @ 934.64s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [930.41s-937.81s] | @ 936.23s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [937.81s-944.77s] | @ 938.02s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [937.81s-944.77s] | @ 940.29s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [937.81s-944.77s] | @ 941.89s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [937.81s-944.77s] | @ 943.38s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 3 [944.77s-946.41s] | @ 945.05s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 3 [944.77s-946.41s] | @ 945.2s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 12: Shot 3 [944.77s-946.41s] | @ 945.62s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 13: Shot 3 [944.77s-946.41s] | @ 945.68s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicryGroup ID: 0ea854df-ad63-d905-6b4e-a96680e4cfddGroup Index: 0
            • +

              Metadata

          104.Player: I was hoping to share my time with you and Shadowheart.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 331e23f9-9b5c-ac7e-1c5c-79c4e78b9ccbSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hcf3937f3gdb97g48cag9b57gc53c271b66dfText UUID: 3ca569db-fa4a-41d9-8677-337397442534Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 83ef3fff-163d-44d1-9a36-e2328e741fd1
          • +
            165.Minthara: I think Shadowheart will require all of your attention. I suspect she is rather needy once you break past that cold exterior.

            Metadata

      327.Minthara: Whatever the case, it seems Lae'zel has left her mark on you, and claimed you as her own.

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a2fcee64-89d7-aa04-b60a-9294bec5b997Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h1ec3ae95g50afg4616ga0d6g012daecaf983Text UUID: c558ae39-d07e-4fd6-975e-5b4f8ef08098Group ID: 8bed2db2-4983-0e88-88e5-a8d44f08e5e8Group Index: 1
      • +

            185.Minthara: Then I am glad that you are no longer mine. You do not have the strength to satisfy both of us.

            Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 35135b5c-2674-eede-f98f-241fda539defSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc25c174bgb1b5g4ba6ga794g0bec93902a4cText UUID: 600bc2dd-2b77-46fd-be6d-4c07d7db762eShow Once: TrueApproval Rating: 83ef3fff-163d-44d1-9a36-e2328e741fd1

            313.Minthara: Amusing. I am not sure you have the strength to satisfy either of us, let alone both.

          479.Minthara: It might be a very short future. If you show him any of the tricks I taught you, he is liable to explode.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 3ade503e-6388-c094-065a-ed950e112870Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hfd222903gb249g4efag872aga08d054fdb2cText UUID: 5ff32d01-382e-41ec-a48b-98b2f8b7b83cShow Once: TrueApproval Rating: 83ef3fff-163d-44d1-9a36-e2328e741fd1

            379.Minthara: For all his rugged charm, Wyll is a man of tradition. He would not share you with a Duke's daughter, let alone an exile from the Underdark.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bd156940-4e9a-731b-3542-7acbfe24a2c3Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hbb5b8164g5511g4a05ga7degf12708f52aefText UUID: 9ea729c8-4c09-4a05-885c-cb74f97d4ca2Timeline Phase Index: 71Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bd156940-4e9a-731b-3542-7acbfe24a2c3Timeline Phase Duration: 11.99sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [508.19s-518.66s] | @ 508.59s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [508.19s-518.66s] | @ 510.93s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [508.19s-518.66s] | @ 513.37s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [508.19s-518.66s] | @ 514.6s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [508.19s-518.66s] | @ 516.29s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [508.19s-518.66s] | @ 517.6s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [518.66s-520.18s] | @ 519.31s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [518.66s-520.18s] | @ 519.64s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [518.66s-520.18s] | @ 519.82s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 10: Shot 2 [518.66s-520.18s] | @ 520.12s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 11: Shot 1 [520.18s-521.58s] | @ 520.18s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)
            • +

          441.Player: I want to be with Karlach, I'm sorry if that hurts you.!ORI_State_DatingMintharaORI_State_WasDatingMinthara

          • +
            428.Minthara: Unlike Karlach, I will recover.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d16e282a-cda1-6f78-1d6a-bb9504584821Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hc7e1d536gf1a5g4504g8d68g0afa29f1f846Text UUID: 3cfa4593-ba47-4783-8bd8-dc7f425d92e6Timeline Phase Index: 124Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d16e282a-cda1-6f78-1d6a-bb9504584821Timeline Phase Duration: 16.41sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1045.31s-1048.17s] | @ 1045.59s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1045.31s-1048.17s] | @ 1047.01s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [1048.17s-1056.84s] | @ 1048.66s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [1048.17s-1056.84s] | @ 1050.11s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1048.17s-1056.84s] | @ 1052.05s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1048.17s-1056.84s] | @ 1054.2s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [1048.17s-1056.84s] | @ 1055.6s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 3 [1056.84s-1061.73s] | @ 1057.3s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 3 [1056.84s-1061.73s] | @ 1058.68s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 3 [1056.84s-1061.73s] | @ 1060.08s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 3 [1056.84s-1061.73s] | @ 1060.95s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Group ID: d16e282a-cda1-6f78-1d6a-bb9504584821Group Index: 0
            • +
              75.Minthara: If you intend to be with her, do not fool yourself into thinking it is more than a brief dalliance before her fire is extinguished for good.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 235a78b4-0aba-cb12-f756-7e376b6e268bSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hc9415a35g66e3g4d5fg844bg1b15681a02b7Text UUID: 732831b6-9940-48c3-8e3c-c3fce56d282dGroup ID: d16e282a-cda1-6f78-1d6a-bb9504584821Group Index: 1
              • +
                469.Minthara: She will die, you will grieve, and then you will be alone.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e13af01f-7991-9b00-4ab9-3c270eb8fdd7Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hea12f1fegeb52g4695ga507g5257e788994dText UUID: e9f3d15f-e5a4-4a74-ab2c-26dcdd3e8eefGroup ID: d16e282a-cda1-6f78-1d6a-bb9504584821Group Index: 2

        • +
          467.Player: I like the ice and the fire. Can't I have you both?

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: e08ead89-1a89-fc8c-7473-56c99d35c640Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h85be8ffagd8a5g4bddg98c4gb07d21ff33e6Text UUID: 67e6d56f-eba7-47de-9496-11f5f15c183dShow Once: TrueApproval Rating: 83ef3fff-163d-44d1-9a36-e2328e741fd1
          • +
            46.Minthara: Karlach will take pleasure wherever she can find it. Her life is too short to do otherwise.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 15cd1e95-b033-c222-77e4-03150f2f6c51Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hff613f2fg4c64g463cgaedbg3402faa10af7Text UUID: 0f6ec84d-ea59-4aae-a270-e8dfc376e19eTimeline Phase Index: 89Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 15cd1e95-b033-c222-77e4-03150f2f6c51Timeline Phase Duration: 13.24sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [612.45s-619.01s] | @ 612.8s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [612.45s-619.01s] | @ 614.71s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [612.45s-619.01s] | @ 616.05s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [612.45s-619.01s] | @ 617.7s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [619.01s-625.68s] | @ 619.39s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [619.01s-625.68s] | @ 622.67s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 2Group ID: 15cd1e95-b033-c222-77e4-03150f2f6c51Group Index: 0
            • +
              203.Minthara: I can afford to have stricter expectations. I do not share anything that I desire.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6675a920-cd39-ca9b-b3e6-4e6369b3222eSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h16ca8842gd891g4325gb917g44ac3904029fText UUID: 99d2b90a-04c7-45b5-98ec-84a8768afdcfGroup ID: 15cd1e95-b033-c222-77e4-03150f2f6c51Group Index: 1

    244.Minthara: I am surprised to see you standing. I thought Astarion might have sucked you dry by now.ORI_State_DatingMintharaORI_State_PartneredORI_State_PartneredWithAstarion!ORI_State_PartneredWithMinthara

      519.Minthara: If he does bite too hard, do not come whimpering to me. He can drain you for all I care.

      Metadata

          Flags and Tags

          • +
            396.Minthara: You do not need to apologise. You will be scarcely capable of satisfying my appetites - the vampire may be more easily nourished.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c53b2f15-7b56-6f0a-65de-6f1a3717a180Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h00bace9egb422g4b91g92eag28673bcb5838Text UUID: f036314d-522b-4d2d-99f3-67064a2bc389Timeline Phase Index: 75Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c53b2f15-7b56-6f0a-65de-6f1a3717a180Timeline Phase Duration: 11.04sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [531.11s-540.65s] | @ 531.26s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [531.11s-540.65s] | @ 533.44s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [531.11s-540.65s] | @ 534.76s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [531.11s-540.65s] | @ 536.25s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [531.11s-540.65s] | @ 537.76s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [531.11s-540.65s] | @ 538.64s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [540.65s-542.15s] | @ 540.85s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [540.65s-542.15s] | @ 541.24s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [540.65s-542.15s] | @ 541.25s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 10: Shot 2 [540.65s-542.15s] | @ 541.38s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicry
            • •
              382.Minthara: All I ask is that you do not let your roving lusts distract from our goals. [End]

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bee87241-a66b-7d3c-c5ac-cd70c6128334Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h9c9f5063g4e1cg4b28g81e0g5de085b739e0Text UUID: 4c222212-507e-4a8c-a805-c557a10d4878Timeline Phase Index: 168Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bee87241-a66b-7d3c-c5ac-cd70c6128334Timeline Phase Duration: 6.13sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1486.93s-1493.07s] | @ 1487.25s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1486.93s-1493.07s] | @ 1488.77s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1486.93s-1493.07s] | @ 1490.07s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1486.93s-1493.07s] | @ 1491.66s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1493.07s-1500.17s] | @ 1493.07s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048) | variation 2End Node: True
        • +
          412.Player: I was hoping I could share my time between you and Astarion.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ccef539e-4c0e-1fd8-a93f-7f5d75f892f0Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h6762eb58gc930g4bdfg8c5cg77144d2caf3eText UUID: e6c99076-a262-436e-a5b4-8b3f63bcf674Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 83ef3fff-163d-44d1-9a36-e2328e741fd1
          • +
            187.Minthara: I suspect that would puncture his fragile ego far more savagely than his fangs puncture your neck.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5e97cda9-0c04-4fa5-f57d-2ff1d44ab5cbSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hf88c299fgf5bfg47abga491ga484dc021aeeText UUID: 4629ba81-baf0-439c-9097-e5b874474d8cTimeline Phase Index: 109Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5e97cda9-0c04-4fa5-f57d-2ff1d44ab5cbTimeline Phase Duration: 23.97sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [831.95s-855.92s] | @ 832.16s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [831.95s-855.92s] | @ 833.91s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [831.95s-855.92s] | @ 835.6s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [831.95s-855.92s] | @ 837.29s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [831.95s-855.92s] | @ 839.1s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [831.95s-855.92s] | @ 840.44s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [831.95s-855.92s] | @ 841.85s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [831.95s-855.92s] | @ 844.18s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 1 [831.95s-855.92s] | @ 846.16s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 1 [831.95s-855.92s] | @ 847.72s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 1 [831.95s-855.92s] | @ 849.35s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 12: Shot 1 [831.95s-855.92s] | @ 851.4s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024)Timeline Emotion 13: Shot 1 [831.95s-855.92s] | @ 853.15s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 2Group ID: 5e97cda9-0c04-4fa5-f57d-2ff1d44ab5cbGroup Index: 0
            • +
              9.Minthara: Astarion likes to put on a show of nonchalant decadence, but he is as delicate as a flake of snow.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 04fc165d-bb50-6a58-ac1d-38e8f123cedaSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h7e38e597gc2ffg4510gae4dg71048efa7ac7Text UUID: 66b0c18c-dba9-4034-80fe-d41fe09669bbGroup ID: 5e97cda9-0c04-4fa5-f57d-2ff1d44ab5cbGroup Index: 1
              • +
                179.Minthara: Besides, that arrangement would not suit me either. I am not delicate, but I do not share what I desire.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 556b4134-59be-b6e7-dd69-d2403d717776Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h4ec40e6fg3e11g4af5gbea5gc166886892c0Text UUID: a2eb362f-f6c9-4350-be38-7b4ddb9b2220Group ID: 5e97cda9-0c04-4fa5-f57d-2ff1d44ab5cbGroup Index: 2
                • +
                  456.Minthara: And I did desire you.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: dd7b77a8-b68c-0e5e-3658-ea36c381d306Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hc7ed8693g9582g43e3gac00g892560e68cdfText UUID: 5d7a90ed-45e4-48c6-8228-33ff54a0bf0fTimeline Phase Index: 48Timeline Dialog Node UUID: dd7b77a8-b68c-0e5e-3658-ea36c381d306Timeline Phase Duration: 3.1sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [363.79s-366.51s] | @ 364.05s | speaker 1 | Sad (32) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [363.79s-366.51s] | @ 364.72s | peanut slot 2 | Sad (32) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [363.79s-366.51s] | @ 364.82s | peanut slot 1 | Sad (32) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [363.79s-366.51s] | @ 364.87s | peanut slot 0 | Sad (32) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [363.79s-366.51s] | @ 365.87s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [363.79s-366.51s] | @ 366.02s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [363.79s-366.51s] | @ 366.32s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [366.51s-366.89s] | @ 366.61s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicry
                  • +

                      274.Minthara: You will be much sorrier if you continue to talk. Go. There is nothing more to say. [End]

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 87c19dea-4fa5-2e1b-5189-120def075a0aSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h42331d5bgfdfcg48ccga80ag84c320cc2baeText UUID: 5b45c319-b856-4735-8d22-f5e13d928209Timeline Phase Index: 164Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 87c19dea-4fa5-2e1b-5189-120def075a0aTimeline Phase Duration: 7.3sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1461.6s-1468.9s] | @ 1461.88s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1461.6s-1468.9s] | @ 1463.89s | speaker 0 | Sad (32) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1461.6s-1468.9s] | @ 1465.16s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1461.6s-1468.9s] | @ 1467.49s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1End Node: True
                  • +
                    156.Player: The feeling was mutual.!ORI_State_DatingMintharaORI_State_WasDatingMinthara

                    Flags and Tags

                    settype Object | speaker 1 Player
                    • ORI_State_DatingMinthara {de1360cd-894b-40ea-95a7-1166d675d040} = False

                    • •
                      458.Minthara: We enjoyed one another for a while. Sometimes that is enough. Now go, there is nothing more to say. [End]

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ddaac6db-e3da-8d5e-b464-180704cee52bSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hb3de1632gaee8g408ag8fb6g34e15b3d207aText UUID: e4867dce-e810-4e9f-a9fc-e627875e697dTimeline Phase Index: 163Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ddaac6db-e3da-8d5e-b464-180704cee52bTimeline Phase Duration: 7.12sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1454.48s-1461.6s] | @ 1455.07s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1454.48s-1461.6s] | @ 1457.36s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1454.48s-1461.6s] | @ 1459.05s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1454.48s-1461.6s] | @ 1460.45s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)End Node: True
                  • +

                      73.Minthara: A little, but it will fade.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 220512c2-f9f9-c8f6-5e1a-6de57716c0e2Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h54b3520bg7f99g438dgad0ag36188b35c4d5Text UUID: fd1b9a14-c527-405f-85f1-3efd992521f5Timeline Phase Index: 103Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 220512c2-f9f9-c8f6-5e1a-6de57716c0e2Timeline Phase Duration: 2.4sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [790.88s-793.29s] | @ 791.17s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [790.88s-793.29s] | @ 792.24s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 1
                      • •

                        Metadata

        • +
          27.Player: I don't want to end our relationship.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 0f5e8317-5885-db2c-51f7-31295d58b2acSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hef2c81bbg5818g47f1g84c6g755819a209f2Text UUID: 19ce44ec-1487-43dc-a80a-47dcfea060c1Show Once: True
          • +
            60.Minthara: Then you should not have begun another.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1ba09150-80d6-8881-efc2-38168fa8acacSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h4357d37bgb6f9g40d1g9118gf1b914001f53Text UUID: ca8ca477-4fc4-43da-8882-c7fabaef8687Timeline Phase Index: 121Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1ba09150-80d6-8881-efc2-38168fa8acacTimeline Phase Duration: 31sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [984.05s-986.24s] | @ 984.26s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 2 [986.24s-994.86s] | @ 986.54s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [986.24s-994.86s] | @ 988.09s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [986.24s-994.86s] | @ 990.03s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [986.24s-994.86s] | @ 991.6s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [986.24s-994.86s] | @ 993.71s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 3 [994.86s-1004.38s] | @ 995.04s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 3 [994.86s-1004.38s] | @ 996.36s | speaker 0 | Sad (32) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 3 [994.86s-1004.38s] | @ 997.9s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 3 [994.86s-1004.38s] | @ 999.77s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 3 [994.86s-1004.38s] | @ 1002.07s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 12: Shot 4 [1004.38s-1013.98s] | @ 1004.61s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 13: Shot 4 [1004.38s-1013.98s] | @ 1006.89s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 14: Shot 4 [1004.38s-1013.98s] | @ 1009.81s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 15: Shot 4 [1004.38s-1013.98s] | @ 1012.32s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 16: Shot 1 [1015.05s-1019.9s] | @ 1015.05s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Group ID: 1ba09150-80d6-8881-efc2-38168fa8acacGroup Index: 0
            • +
              338.Minthara: In Menzoberranzan, I had a thousand suitors. Some were only attracted by my status, many only wanted my body - a rare few wanted all of me.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a72c2004-9e68-a5ed-c690-4f4702959e0cSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h8179e0a9g8044g4a8bgbf88gbd66d3ac2499Text UUID: 43c08adc-291f-4e93-9051-e6dd83fa43f5Group ID: 1ba09150-80d6-8881-efc2-38168fa8acacGroup Index: 1
              • +
                488.Minthara: The more they pursued me, the less I desired them. I tired of them all.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e9a6e12b-2054-fc47-5af3-2c7f1538dc1cSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h388010f2g1d06g4d07g9725gb8ec36c0d138Text UUID: b9a41144-74eb-455b-b11a-f733e47bffc7Group ID: 1ba09150-80d6-8881-efc2-38168fa8acacGroup Index: 2
                • +
                  35.Minthara: Here, with you, I enjoyed that there was no pursuit, and there was no status. We simply were.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 120759d9-fdfc-685a-a752-6531126c6745Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: ha785e365g6991g44edg8762g4eb643e26f78Text UUID: 6ea560bd-eb80-4906-8585-3aade2c27e89Group ID: 1ba09150-80d6-8881-efc2-38168fa8acacGroup Index: 3
                  • +
                    245.Player: I liked that too - we can have it again.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 7ac625db-7219-680e-8c94-a0480d1dc447Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h4a8a0253g6c6ag480bga1f6gef7aadbb6cfcText UUID: fabb4f24-1725-405a-9498-8849b2e7e8d4Show Once: True
                    • +
                      513.Minthara: Then you must tell the wizard you belong to me. I am sure he will survive - after all, he has been rejected by a goddess in the past.ORI_State_PartneredWithGale

                      Flags and Tags

                      checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
                      • ORI_State_PartneredWithGale {e008e20d-d642-42ed-9008-297b6273aa21} = True

                      • +
                        514.Minthara: You have your charms, but you are far from divine.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fb16433b-762d-505c-ca76-b9094ec3d74fSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h8ed16849ga0b4g4836g8bcagcec4a5755fe1Text UUID: 09b3344d-959d-43cb-aefd-62870ba754d8Group ID: fa7bf74d-c816-5628-de4b-316d91d497a3Group Index: 1
                        • +

        356.Player: It was a mistake - you're the one I want.

        Metadata

          216.Minthara: Of course I am. But you no longer have me, and you never will.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6c4a0d0e-e54f-7ed9-4dff-5d08a1ddee14Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: haccbce5ag4732g420fgbc28g1108ba8b3ec6Text UUID: 860d5206-75cb-4edd-9589-5d0ac692caffTimeline Phase Index: 87Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6c4a0d0e-e54f-7ed9-4dff-5d08a1ddee14Timeline Phase Duration: 4.79sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [601.6s-606.39s] | @ 601.75s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [601.6s-606.39s] | @ 603.09s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [601.6s-606.39s] | @ 604.79s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1
          • •
            26.Minthara: As long as you do not let your lusts distract you from the fight, we do not need to speak of this again. [End]

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0ee3d02f-8d5b-7c75-9cca-891c74891e1bSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h3ce5d6cag0f90g47ddgb010g9dcae9dd83cfText UUID: f2317817-dc0e-4d21-bb0a-29c052f2fbf6Timeline Phase Index: 171Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0ee3d02f-8d5b-7c75-9cca-891c74891e1bTimeline Phase Duration: 6.53sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1518.51s-1525.04s] | @ 1518.67s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1518.51s-1525.04s] | @ 1519.78s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1518.51s-1525.04s] | @ 1522.28s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)End Node: True

    • +
      424.Minthara: Astarion is so used to playing the nocturnal hunter, he thought you would make for easy prey.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d01d1803-514d-e8ae-9a09-c8182d7985ffSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h45717b5dgc959g4f4ega797g86680352e174Text UUID: a1af8799-0f27-433a-9d9c-048506c7b037Timeline Phase Index: 82Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d01d1803-514d-e8ae-9a09-c8182d7985ffTimeline Phase Duration: 6.73sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [578.65s-585.38s] | @ 578.69s | peanut slot 0 | Sad (32) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [578.65s-585.38s] | @ 578.8s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [578.65s-585.38s] | @ 578.88s | peanut slot 1 | Sad (32) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [578.65s-585.38s] | @ 580.19s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [578.65s-585.38s] | @ 582.71s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [578.65s-585.38s] | @ 584.25s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)
      • +
        149.Minthara: But you made it clear that you are mine, and mine alone.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 489bbfc9-a9a7-22fb-6eea-77e90ea31494Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h674b8722gf4b4g4f53g8b69g91a834c7b546Text UUID: 5835d11e-1046-40f3-a958-1696b22a6f7bTimeline Phase Index: 129Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 489bbfc9-a9a7-22fb-6eea-77e90ea31494Timeline Phase Duration: 5.76sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1107.69s-1110.74s] | @ 1108s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1107.69s-1110.74s] | @ 1108.36s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1107.69s-1110.74s] | @ 1108.61s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1107.69s-1110.74s] | @ 1108.67s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1107.69s-1110.74s] | @ 1109.21s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1107.69s-1110.74s] | @ 1109.53s | speaker 1 | emotion unchanged | variation 2Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [1107.69s-1110.74s] | @ 1109.94s | peanut slot 0 | emotion unchanged | variation 2 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [1107.69s-1110.74s] | @ 1110.26s | peanut slot 2 | emotion unchanged | variation 2 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 1 [1107.69s-1110.74s] | @ 1110.4s | peanut slot 1 | emotion unchanged | variation 2 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 10: Shot 2 [1110.74s-1112.31s] | @ 1110.86s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1
        • +
          300.Player: Exactly. I don't want anyone else.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 93975c4f-b102-166e-2087-85f9c6e553faSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: ha5397637gc9e9g44b5ga6f6gfae5c86f4f32Text UUID: d725ab58-9ef5-434d-a8ff-9900cfdf383dShow Once: True
          • •
            28.Minthara: Let the others desire you - let them desire us both. They cannot have us so long as we belong to one another. [End]

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0fe56cda-2af4-0b42-3d37-9e287f69ecefSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hf048d4a7ga49dg4626ga792g24c3bd51642eText UUID: fbfeec3a-043d-46d9-bf67-f49b2af3bb5fTimeline Phase Index: 162Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0fe56cda-2af4-0b42-3d37-9e287f69ecefTimeline Phase Duration: 8.69sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1445.79s-1454.48s] | @ 1446.04s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1445.79s-1454.48s] | @ 1448.12s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1445.79s-1454.48s] | @ 1449.17s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1445.79s-1454.48s] | @ 1450.5s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1445.79s-1454.48s] | @ 1452.35s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1End Node: TrueUnmapped Attributes: ApprovalRatingID
        • +
          206.Player: Yes. And that you are mine.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 686a3b3b-8a90-9303-a974-be06969bcd01Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: he8f6931cgb760g450eg895dg2054ade42ec3Text UUID: 11cc538f-064f-4138-98bc-6232f81c9e37Show Once: True
          • See Node 28 (Minthara) Let the others desire you - let them desire us both. They cannot have us so long as we belong to one another.

          164.Player: I have my doubts about you, but let's see where it goes.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4e232cbc-4c87-e453-a0ea-1f94cf85367aSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hf17ceaa0g3ca3g4349g913agf4066051a9abText UUID: e5f263ff-d670-473f-b5ee-bc73382983c8Show Once: True
          • •
            431.Minthara: Dismiss your doubts. If I cannot be sure of your devotion to me, I would prefer not to share my body or mind with you at all. [End]

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d3849fce-1a50-4bc1-af05-531e115174e6Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h25344a8cge50eg4c6dg9f46gd7009d84df6eText UUID: e7a54941-d0b3-422b-b002-cac1137ba7dcTimeline Phase Index: 165Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d3849fce-1a50-4bc1-af05-531e115174e6Timeline Phase Duration: 10.09sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1468.9s-1478.99s] | @ 1469.15s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1468.9s-1478.99s] | @ 1471.23s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1468.9s-1478.99s] | @ 1472.28s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1468.9s-1478.99s] | @ 1473.62s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1468.9s-1478.99s] | @ 1475.47s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1468.9s-1478.99s] | @ 1476.68s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [1468.9s-1478.99s] | @ 1477.98s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [1478.99s-1483.63s] | @ 1478.99s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1End Node: True

          308.Minthara: They are vulnerable because they have not had enough competition in recent times.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9a00569a-24e4-044e-fef8-2ce310d8cf85Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h2634f7e2g25cbg486cgbf73gea3e9ce51d8bText UUID: ec039c8f-b8bc-4582-a3b8-a8f504b4c5e0Group ID: b9806743-3af6-7f23-ac2e-8fe66792f90cGroup Index: 1
          • +
            224.Minthara: In Menzoberranzan, my House has been the most significant power for thousands of years, but it has never been a peaceful reign. That is by design.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 727310aa-f073-3bcc-e3f8-40089c79c969Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h1ea66c69g3bb0g4cbegae1dgd4d98e04e00bText UUID: 43afdd5c-e25d-455d-b5d1-7a9341f0e09aGroup ID: b9806743-3af6-7f23-ac2e-8fe66792f90cGroup Index: 2
            • +
              72.Minthara: We do not eradicate our enemies entirely because they make us strong. And if there is no external threat, we turn our knives on one another.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 217e9d30-fb31-a296-597b-285625a63788Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hd6cebbe6g5777g4b51gb1f5g4c051337d794Text UUID: a5c8d4af-4f1d-4b95-b81f-25df0eb608f7Group ID: b9806743-3af6-7f23-ac2e-8fe66792f90cGroup Index: 3
              • +
                490.Minthara: It is only through competition that any of us can remain strong. The Guild may have become too comfortable to remember that.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: eae1853f-76b7-e28c-95dd-9f4a7f98c0d6Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hb29083fdg34ceg4827g9035g99bb036192d3Text UUID: 8a8dccbf-0e55-4fb1-8b32-2ae6e1112ebcGroup ID: b9806743-3af6-7f23-ac2e-8fe66792f90cGroup Index: 4
                • •

          136.Minthara: If you fight an army, kill the general and the troops will disperse. If you fight a giant, lacerate its tendons and spine to bring it down to size.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 42cdcfb9-e931-3e4c-67c0-33c526a30cc6Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h457d52ebgecddg41fegbc53gda0b71520bf2Text UUID: 738f52d7-11a3-4dd3-a846-cf625791d9c2Group ID: 2dd7ddc1-bc5c-8619-0ea3-e3394b0101b6Group Index: 1
          • +
            493.Minthara: We cannot hope to dismantle every Watcher, so we should avoid their attention until we can strike their nerve centre.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ed6fbec6-af43-48e6-0344-2245185a938cSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h86a8cc77gfd26g4e6dg806ag39b5e9abe6aaText UUID: c36d041d-c8e8-4f4a-ac8a-328bfc60a2c3Group ID: 2dd7ddc1-bc5c-8619-0ea3-e3394b0101b6Group Index: 2
            • +
              376.Minthara: It is rare that gnomes prove useful, but the runepowder bomb the Ironhands provided should be our weapon of choice.WYR_Ironhand_Event_TerroristQuest_Accepted

              Flags and Tags

              checktype Global
              • WYR_Ironhand_Event_TerroristQuest_Accepted {0dae7572-9ff4-4991-900b-dadfe153d306} = True

                    100.Minthara: Controlling an unruly slave by holding a knife to the throat of their child is a time-honoured tactic - the collars and hostages work on the same principle.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2f75669e-d5ed-2ac1-add8-9526bd501aabSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: ha6534bfcgd7a0g40d8g981aga9e9fdacaa93Text UUID: 76ca646a-9a3e-4b24-84a1-751c72b206bbGroup ID: c197f828-ea88-abf2-8823-144dc8a706cbGroup Index: 1
                    • +
                      271.Minthara: These people are nothing to us. Why should we care if the knife does its work?

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8791eab5-e734-6553-e07e-f98e599b7665Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h73c5c31fg7a41g4d11ga395gc469bd891986Text UUID: 9b7a7b99-6b2d-481b-b016-9f5656384650Group ID: c197f828-ea88-abf2-8823-144dc8a706cbGroup Index: 2

                284.Player: What if there is no way to shut them all down?

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 8cc79c6a-fcb5-6980-d25f-310fc48b1ff7Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h775a5e28g059cg4211g8802ge277c9df14f8Text UUID: 0a07807e-1868-48c9-9a06-29d5048d1cafShow Once: True
                • +
                  153.Minthara: Do not be fooled by their appearance. The Watchers are forged and cast like machines, but they are a hivemind like any other.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4a356844-15c8-537a-c5c1-d9378361488eSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h4718bf34gedbeg4802gb848ga0bfdb22756eText UUID: 071e39a7-e2a4-4c69-baa0-37ee658b7037Timeline Phase Index: 128Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4a356844-15c8-537a-c5c1-d9378361488eTimeline Phase Duration: 16.83sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1090.86s-1100.82s] | @ 1092.76s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1090.86s-1100.82s] | @ 1094.41s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1090.86s-1100.82s] | @ 1095.25s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1090.86s-1100.82s] | @ 1096.95s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1090.86s-1100.82s] | @ 1098.28s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1100.83s-1107.69s] | @ 1101.08s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [1100.83s-1107.69s] | @ 1103.65s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [1100.83s-1107.69s] | @ 1106.15s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Group ID: 4a356844-15c8-537a-c5c1-d9378361488eGroup Index: 0
                  • •
                    248.Minthara: A central intelligence guides them. If we find the source of that intelligence, we can destroy it.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7c5ffb86-684a-55fd-a5b2-0961040b59c2Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: he3128fc7g8444g4ff6ga68eg622825af942dText UUID: 4bedf6c2-d544-45cc-b565-7ba54df61f62Group ID: 4a356844-15c8-537a-c5c1-d9378361488eGroup Index: 1
              • •

        462.Minthara: We will need every advantage to survive the battles that are to come, and my illithid parasite has already shown its worth.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: df3c1d6b-1ffb-f57a-6db4-d389db1453b9Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h6ac38dc2gcf9ag4129g814cg5dea01130b4dText UUID: 3283b2e4-3d43-4434-ba86-46245a313d39Timeline Phase Index: 39Timeline Dialog Node UUID: df3c1d6b-1ffb-f57a-6db4-d389db1453b9Timeline Phase Duration: 17.34sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [309.46s-316.81s] | @ 309.52s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [309.46s-316.81s] | @ 310.23s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [309.46s-316.81s] | @ 311.42s | speaker 0 | Sad (32) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [309.46s-316.81s] | @ 312.63s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [309.46s-316.81s] | @ 314.01s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [309.46s-316.81s] | @ 315.56s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [316.81s-318.6s] | @ 317.24s | speaker 1 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [316.81s-318.6s] | @ 317.39s | peanut slot 1 | Fear (16) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [316.81s-318.6s] | @ 317.47s | peanut slot 2 | Fear (16) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 10: Shot 2 [316.81s-318.6s] | @ 317.83s | peanut slot 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 11: Shot 3 [318.6s-326.8s] | @ 318.87s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 12: Shot 3 [318.6s-326.8s] | @ 320.66s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 13: Shot 3 [318.6s-326.8s] | @ 322.47s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 14: Shot 3 [318.6s-326.8s] | @ 324.47s | speaker 0 | Sad (32) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 15: Shot 3 [318.6s-326.8s] | @ 325.91s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Group ID: df3c1d6b-1ffb-f57a-6db4-d389db1453b9Group Index: 0

            240.Minthara: I say we put the devil from our minds, and trust in ourselves. If anyone should have the power of the Crown, it should be us.

            Metadata

      415.Player: Have you ever seen anything like the Steel Watch before?!ORI_Minthara_HasMet_SteelWatcherGLO_SteelWatchers_HasMetORI_Minthara_HasMet_SteelWatcher

        128.Minthara: No. They seem to combine the obedience and strength of a golem with the precision and intelligence of their creator.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3e4bae9a-2f79-4387-387d-ad77a494868aSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h51434509gc8d8g48d8gb5b7g23ca688bedf3Text UUID: 5caf7a09-55cd-c26e-d9fe-78b5e30fbf8aTimeline         • +
          189.Minthara: For now, they act as a defensive wall of steel, but their true purpose is conquest. Mechanised slaughter.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5f8aadfd-970c-f10c-8deb-22b797af848bSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h493d7384g3080g44fag8ef2g97184ae50cbfText UUID: e6cc36e7-1583-48c4-9439-229746af047cGroup ID: 3e4bae9a-2f79-4387-387d-ad77a494868aGroup Index: 1
          • +
            140.Minthara: Imagine how quickly the grove would have fallen if we had machines like those to command. Imagine how quickly a city would fall.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 44e7ecc9-4313-c935-201a-0b7d619bc0d2Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h2f9d2568g27f6g40c4g8f3dgfc34876f15a6Text UUID: 75a1997e-d08a-4115-9214-1046e45f2329Group ID: 3e4bae9a-2f79-4387-387d-ad77a494868aGroup Index: 2
            • +
              146.Minthara: Gortash has revolutionised warfare.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 46e519f4-aa40-894c-1429-081930d31dccSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h83a894d5g1121g4054g9096gb5b7deea0559Text UUID: 4225f23f-44d6-464e-8281-eea03f80aeb9Group ID: 3e4bae9a-2f79-4387-387d-ad77a494868aGroup Index: 3
              • +
                141.Player: I wish we had such devices of our own.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 450d56e7-fadd-f879-6616-52a61751bfe4Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h636f8019g1346g48f0gabcagc367ed53a696Text UUID: 301f5d7d-814d-496c-87d5-127a729ee61aShow Once: TrueApproval Rating: 3d50bea5-334e-494e-8ae8-8bf79f922b04
                • +
                  373.Minthara: The tools used to construct and control them may well be here in the city. If we were to control Baldur's Gate, the Steel Watch could be ours.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bc854cc0-69be-7edc-8def-f3e438210794Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h8bebef89g83f7g4adfg9a45g617bf0422d47Text UUID: 9e73c95d-d160-45aa-a991-39a53607e03eTimeline Phase Index: 130Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bc854cc0-69be-7edc-8def-f3e438210794Timeline Phase Duration: 22.47sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1113.45s-1124.29s] | @ 1113.83s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1113.45s-1124.29s] | @ 1115.12s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1113.45s-1124.29s] | @ 1116.51s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1113.45s-1124.29s] | @ 1118.95s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1113.45s-1124.29s] | @ 1120.52s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1113.45s-1124.29s] | @ 1121.98s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [1124.29s-1135.92s] | @ 1124.52s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [1124.29s-1135.92s] | @ 1126.14s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [1124.29s-1135.92s] | @ 1127.83s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 2 [1124.29s-1135.92s] | @ 1130.05s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 2 [1124.29s-1135.92s] | @ 1132.04s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 12: Shot 2 [1124.29s-1135.92s] | @ 1133.43s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 13: Shot 2 [1124.29s-1135.92s] | @ 1134.85s | speaker 0 | Sad (32) | variation 1Group ID: bc854cc0-69be-7edc-8def-f3e438210794Group Index: 0
                  • +
                    168.Minthara: Better to control the elder brain though. Iron crumbles, steel breaks, but the power of a thought or an idea can be infinite.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 50f617e1-dc94-b7b2-5ab6-8354c1878688Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hc0a2e879g583dg4806gadc3g32eeb392ad33Text UUID: 03091048-1e83-4b46-882b-f9c6a127e3f6Group ID: bc854cc0-69be-7edc-8def-f3e438210794Group Index: 1
                    • •
                      157.Jump to Node 85

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: JumpUUID: 4b5c9ec0-8a6a-6eb4-8551-5a333abaace7Jump Target: Node 85 (29d197b6-1968-4a76-3bfc-8b07083f6f86)Jump Target Point: 2
              • +
                207.Player: In the right hands, they could keep the peace without risk of bloodshed.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 68a2b94e-8321-aaf8-a42b-32dd332a1d39Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h3b9270a7gd0d5g4049g96a4g7e2a1fe2de3cText UUID: 9a6f2ba2-6d58-46b4-85c7-7d017ca2b78dShow Once: True
                • +
                  355.Minthara: Without bloodshed on the winning side, perhaps. The machines will always need something to kill, if only to show their strength.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b0be472e-f386-fe10-2180-630a42068468Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hb9d5fb0dgd9bbg4872gb3d2g8a3ff33aa7a0Text UUID: Index: 0
                  • +
                    171.Minthara: That is why we should make sure we are the ones giving the orders, rather than the ones on the receiving end of them.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 51e5c8cf-fe03-cb4b-5ed9-055aa46600ffSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h5c57caf6g19c5g4ae2gb843g0885a3082b5fText UUID: 1b7b9dfc-b098-4d54-9df4-7c5e6585f28dGroup ID: b0be472e-f386-fe10-2180-630a42068468Group Index: 1
                    • See Node 157 Jump to Node 85
              • +
                438.Player: We need to destroy them, and put a stop to this 'revolution'.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d672de89-fb16-bbf2-7cf0-012cff8e7eb3Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h80048a44g9cbdg447fg89feg59fe46b7736cText UUID: 689d6057-4ac4-40a9-a406-74e3999b524cShow Once: TrueApproval Rating: a2dbbd87-20bb-4b1a-819e-5400bf66eca1
                • +
                  383.Minthara: We could melt every Steel Watcher down to dross and change nothing. We cannot stop an idea, and we cannot stop progress.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bfc47741-0693-85d6-d22d-39adb2973e2aSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h08a77c69g4633g4c2dgbbc5ge36610fbe2d7Text UUID: ad99e6b3-99de-48aa-90e5-a9be67593dc0Timeline Phase Index: 26Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bfc47741-0693-85d6-d22d-39adb2973e2aTimeline Phase Duration: 21.07sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [209.37s-219.57s] | @ 209.56s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [209.37s-219.57s] | @ 211.3s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [209.37s-219.57s] | @ 213.68s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [209.37s-219.57s] | @ 215.62s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [209.37s-219.57s] | @ 217.66s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [219.57s-223.5s] | @ 220.12s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [219.57s-223.5s] | @ 220.52s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [219.57s-223.5s] | @ 220.82s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [219.57s-223.5s] | @ 220.97s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 10: Shot 2 [219.57s-223.5s] | @ 222.04s | speaker 1 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 2 [219.57s-223.5s] | @ 222.57s | peanut slot 1 | Fear (16) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 12: Shot 2 [219.57s-223.5s] | @ 222.77s | peanut slot 0 | Fear (16) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 13: Shot 2 [219.57s-223.5s] | @ 222.87s | peanut slot 2 | Fear (16) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 14: Shot 3 [223.5s-230.44s] | @ 223.86s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 15: Shot 3 [223.5s-230.44s] | @ 225.72s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 16: Shot 3 [223.5s-230.44s] | @ 227.74s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Group ID: bfc47741-0693-85d6-d22d-39adb2973e2aGroup Index: 0
                  • +
                    236.Minthara: And nor should we. Instead, it falls to us to make sure we control the idea and profit from progress.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 76927452-6309-fda9-73c3-605d45ad0809Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h0f91cd78g133dg4cecgb708gc7c584392d11Text UUID: 0b5f946a-dde6-45f9-9268-eee81c13ddfdGroup ID: bfc47741-0693-85d6-d22d-39adb2973e2aGroup Index: 1
                    • See Node 157 Jump to Node 85
    • +

          22.Player: Connect your mind with her's and show her every grotesque thought and deed in full, gory detail.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 0e2129c3-9cfb-cdfa-0d85-2c685184bdbaSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5ec1229eg55c3g4d59gad16g5d8909c075c6Text UUID: af5e0654-a7ae-4120-a6b4-8a3b28523756Show Once: True
          • +

              188.Narrator: *She absorbs every detail, whether memory or dream, and drinks deep of them. You sense a desire in her equal in strength to your darkest urge.*

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5f198784-1ad1-7417-bc61-62f1bf935787Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: hae020710ga6c6g4e0fg944ag3d4edcded95eText UUID: a88cc386-0aaa-4528-a078-4dc7a6dd4d5aGroup ID: 134004cd-8faa-4532-951d-a81e5de38c0fGroup Index: 1
              • +
                113.Minthara: Elgg-hor... duk-tak... slayer. There are many names for you, my love, and all of them inspire dread. You are exquisite.ORI_State_PartneredWithMinthara

                Flags and Tags

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: fdbe2715-cbb8-1bf2-44b2-fcbb1841d095Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h04b45f2cg18a9g4cc1ga1e4g00e5df256141Text UUID: 4e467ed0-afec-2c0e-a88b-dc10015b4b46Show Once: True
      • +
        445.Minthara: He is the only authority figure in Baldur's Gate worth a damn.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d91c645e-9ef7-1f84-76f5-ba992b97422cSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h37136707gf7eeg4754g8c9fg60ec78b767c9Text UUID: fe5d90c5-0115-63a6-6e53-f04289bf6681Timeline Phase Index: 145Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d91c645e-9ef7-1f84-76f5-ba992b97422cTimeline Phase Duration: 20.86sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1257.09s-1269.55s] | @ 1257.4s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1257.09s-1269.55s] | @ 1259.26s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1257.09s-1269.55s] | @ 1261.62s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1257.09s-1269.55s] | @ 1263.2s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1257.09s-1269.55s] | @ 1265.38s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1257.09s-1269.55s] | @ 1267.7s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [1269.55s-1271.39s] | @ 1269.7s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [1269.55s-1271.39s] | @ 1270.07s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [1269.55s-1271.39s] | @ 1270.51s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 10: Shot 2 [1269.55s-1271.39s] | @ 1270.55s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 11: Shot 3 [1271.4s-1277.95s] | @ 1271.78s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 12: Shot 3 [1271.4s-1277.95s] | @ 1273.84s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 13: Shot 3 [1271.4s-1277.95s] | @ 1276.39s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 1Group ID: d91c645e-9ef7-1f84-76f5-ba992b97422cGroup Index: 0
        • +
          495.Minthara: Even as the elder brain tears at the foundations of the city, he stands strong, and looks for solutions.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ee8054ae-8dc5-fc82-baf2-7fd89da95692Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h9ed377a6gaee4g48d2g9918gb031c1d2af59Text UUID: cee5fa9e-f359-7950-a32b-3c06a83dd9c6Group ID: d91c645e-9ef7-1f84-76f5-ba992b97422cGroup Index: 1
          • +
            208.Minthara: Better for us to be a solution rather than a problem for his Steel Watch to scrape off the street.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 68e73f60-370b-3d4c-52f3-6b7edf2420b3Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: he5123fb1gae62g4607gb698gf19ad733556cText UUID: 9639f4fb-f3e9-443c-b8bd-86984be73510Group ID: d91c645e-9ef7-1f84-76f5-ba992b97422cGroup Index: 2
            • +
              503.Minthara: I am glad you recognised the benefits of that approach. If he proves troublesome, we can always kill him later, when his guard is down.WYR_KillDirectorGortash_State_AcceptedAlliance

              Flags and Tags

              checktype Global
              • WYR_KillDirectorGortash_State_AcceptedAlliance {92e647a6-4625-4a2b-a143-35cba456fe50} = True

              118.Minthara: It would be wise to return to him and pledge an oath of allegiance before he declares us enemies of the peace.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 39b4bc68-41f7-688c-7b68-d34a8fe02ef1Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h451f8791g55f7g453egb807gd56230d69ef2Text UUID: 9885adf0-7ad0-009c-5536-222c2890691dTimeline Phase Index: 139Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 39b4bc68-41f7-688c-7b68-d34a8fe02ef1Timeline Phase Duration: 7.33sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1216.73s-1221.25s] | @ 1216.73s | speaker 1 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1216.73s-1221.25s] | @ 1216.92s | peanut slot 2 | Sad (32) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1216.73s-1221.25s] | @ 1217.38s | peanut slot 0 | Sad (32) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1216.73s-1221.25s] | @ 1217.63s | peanut slot 1 | Sad (32) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1216.73s-1221.25s] | @ 1218.09s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4) | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1216.73s-1221.25s] | @ 1218.51s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [1216.73s-1221.25s] | @ 1218.58s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [1216.73s-1221.25s] | @ 1218.66s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 1 [1216.73s-1221.25s] | @ 1219.91s | speaker 1 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 1 [1216.73s-1221.25s] | @ 1220.06s | peanut slot 1 | Fear (16) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 11: Shot 1 [1216.73s-1221.25s] | @ 1220.17s | peanut slot 0 | Fear (16) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 12: Shot 1 [1216.73s-1221.25s] | @ 1220.5s | peanut slot 2 | Fear (16) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 13: Shot 2 [1221.25s-1224.06s] | @ 1221.39s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 14: Shot 2 [1221.25s-1224.06s] | @ 1222.37s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 15: Shot 1 [1224.06s-1229.52s] | @ 1224.06s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 2

      • +
        71.Minthara: Yes. I only know it through history books and hearsay - a city of murder and grief.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2165b30f-013c-b185-de7e-fe5b54c9190fSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h06bc1c4ege408g4a1cgb31cgec741c43a894Text UUID: 7c7f512f-314f-67f7-f8b6-14539724f709Timeline Phase Index: 101Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2165b30f-013c-b185-de7e-fe5b54c9190fTimeline Phase Duration: 8.19sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [737.73s-745.92s] | @ 737.84s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [737.73s-745.92s] | @ 739.47s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [737.73s-745.92s] | @ 741.14s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [737.73s-745.92s] | @ 742.87s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [737.73s-745.92s] | @ 744.74s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [745.92s-750.92s] | @ 745.92s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)
        • +
          6.Minthara: It is already living up to the legend.WYR_OpenHand_Knows_Murder

          Flags and Tags

          checktype Global

        44.Minthara: You did not falter, you freed yourself. Your oath is a burden - let it go.

        Metadata

        49.Minthara: I took up my oath long ago, when I swore bloody vengeance against any who defied Lolth. Now, I myself have sinned against the Spider Queen.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1784636b-94c5-e62f-841f-a521b9f81681Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hc49a9122geab7g4145gbe4cg4c97e7f6ed1cText UUID: 0d0439dc-59b3-4ecd-a11f-d1e3c759c058Timeline Phase Index: 91Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1784636b-94c5-e62f-841f-a521b9f81681Timeline Phase Duration: 12.1sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [653.43s-665.53s] | @ 653.59s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [653.43s-665.53s] | @ 653.62s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [653.43s-665.53s] | @ 655.07s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [653.43s-665.53s] | @ 656.79s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [653.43s-665.53s] | @ 658.5s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [653.43s-665.53s] | @ 660.01s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [653.43s-665.53s] | @ 661.61s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [653.43s-665.53s] | @ 663.6s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1
        • +
          252.Minthara: Though my faith is shattered, my oath endures. I am sworn to destroy all those who serve the Absolute.!Oathbreaker

          Flags and Tags

          checktype Tag | speaker 0 Minthara
          • Oathbreaker {c7bdcdf2-15e7-456e-adf1-21dda3172e18} = False

          Metadata

              344.Minthara: When I have had my vengeance on the cult, I do not know if my oath will still hold.

              Metadata

                95.Minthara: I do know that when I take the Absolute's power, I will not lose control of it as our enemies have. I will harness it to create a more perfect world.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2e33f298-4683-e9de-156b-23b5c88a0c52Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hd84124bdg4a47g4369gadcfg1f7d9d9a2bc9Text UUID: efad6ee1-3252-48b9-a91f-e7555c75192fGroup ID: aa98c357-e1a5-9567-2824-8e6ff003d443Group Index: 1

                  418.Minthara: We are all that stands between this world and annihilation.

                  Metadata

            111.Minthara: Not directly. My memories were not removed, they were obscured by the Absolute's voice - by its presence.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 35ab9399-b4ea-3671-5951-99d4ddb1874dSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h5eea7224g139ag4aacga8a6gd58b2e7024c1Text UUID: 0ffb69b3-84b5-4d7b-b12d-56736032cbeaTimeline Phase Index: 156Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 35ab9399-b4ea-3671-5951-99d4ddb1874dTimeline Phase Duration: 30.08sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1380.21s-1398.62s] | @ 1380.31s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1380.21s-1398.62s] | @ 1382.32s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1380.21s-1398.62s] | @ 1384.27s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1380.21s-1398.62s] | @ 1385.91s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1380.21s-1398.62s] | @ 1388.05s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1380.21s-1398.62s] | @ 1390.22s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [1380.21s-1398.62s] | @ 1392.62s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [1380.21s-1398.62s] | @ 1394.28s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 1 [1380.21s-1398.62s] | @ 1396.38s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 2 [1398.62s-1410.29s] | @ 1398.95s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 2 [1398.62s-1410.29s] | @ 1401.39s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 12: Shot 2 [1398.62s-1410.29s] | @ 1403.26s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 13: Shot 2 [1398.62s-1410.29s] | @ 1406.13s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 14: Shot 2 [1398.62s-1410.29s] | @ 1407.85s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 15: Shot 2 [1398.62s-1410.29s] | @ 1409.08s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Group ID: 35ab9399-b4ea-3671-5951-99d4ddb1874dGroup Index: 0
            • +
              398.Minthara: The tadpole is a conduit for that voice, not its origin, and while the Prism protects us, the Absolute cannot reach us.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c62c4c8f-b8ca-791a-bfd2-017ed01c391eSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hcede68ddg7d36g4991g906cg55d1e2dcafbaText UUID: 6c779a91-1f23-4d2c-917a-dec4940246eaGroup ID: 35ab9399-b4ea-3671-5951-99d4ddb1874dGroup Index: 1
              • +
                518.Minthara: As for the tadpoles themselves, for the moment I do not believe they are malevolent. They are incubating within our brain-matter, not feeding on it.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fb87dfc3-582e-44e5-2952-f16fecf8b301Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: head5b648gf908g4567g83ccg132e747e9f49Text UUID: d3bf8329-3736-43c6-be24-87a78b447933Group ID: 35ab9399-b4ea-3671-5951-99d4ddb1874dGroup Index: 2
                • •
                  167.Minthara: If they were, we would all spend our days in a berserk rage, and our nights talking to hamsters.ORI_Minsc_State_IsInParty

                  Flags and Tags

                  checktype Global
                  • ORI_Minsc_State_IsInParty {aeb58e60-562a-4e20-8cb2-0deb03b010fc} = True

          123.Player: I yearn to kill. I only feel like myself when I'm killing.ORI_DarkUrge_State_DidNotHaveIsobelKillOrder!ORI_DarkUrge_Knows_ViolentORI_DarkUrge_Knows_Violent

            132.Minthara: Is there a reason you chose me as your confidante in this matter?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 416a0fdc-eccf-3391-91a5-b2150aed8dd7Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h27498140gdc16g4180g9510g0bc49e8a8ea4Text UUID: c336a804-883d-40a8-a255-28478e463becTimeline Phase Index: 133Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 416a0fdc-eccf-3391-91a5-b2150aed8dd7Timeline Phase Duration: 4.61sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1141.98s-1146.33s] | @ 1142.11s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1141.98s-1146.33s] | @ 1143.49s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1141.98s-1146.33s] | @ 1144.65s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)
            • +
              273.Player: I thought you'd understand - you're a killer too.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 87c0048d-ee7f-ed71-a7fd-73383f2a6e3fSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hee29ce51gff45g48f9gbf24g6f206f4f5238Text UUID: c0c9be84-aef4-4bb8-99a0-3091c665e428Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: c0d84e77-26e8-44fc-831d-36f44bcdd2ca
              • +
                97.Minthara: I take pleasure in harming my enemies, but I do not kill for the joy of it. Only when it serves my ambitions to do so.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2e5109d8-324c-b623-abb8-0e5645ff5f46Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h53863b44g2c9ag4070g8252g3e458d31dd75Text UUID: 82a2d38a-b743-4a81-b7e0-bb26bfc9d30eTimeline Phase Index: 157Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2e5109d8-324c-b623-abb8-0e5645ff5f46Timeline Phase Duration: 9.44sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1410.29s-1419.74s] | @ 1410.35s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1410.29s-1419.74s] | @ 1411.59s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1410.29s-1419.74s] | @ 1413.42s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1410.29s-1419.74s] | @ 1414.81s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1410.29s-1419.74s] | @ 1416.89s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1410.29s-1419.74s] | @ 1418.36s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1
                • +
                  21.Minthara: There are those within Menzoberranzan that we call qu'lith quarthen - those driven-by-blood.

                  Metadata

                  • +
                    388.Minthara: They are the mad, lost to all reason, and subservient to nobody. Even Lolth, malicious and brutal as she is, cannot abide them.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c1c9fc80-6a03-f1ac-6555-4aff16eac738Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h7eac5682g9faeg450dg98ddg9914c9cc3620Text UUID: d3c7911f-b40a-4547-bc6e-db63f39576e7Group ID: 0dea0ddf-9fac-d68b-49f8-bda43683071bGroup Index: 1
                    • +
                      30.Minthara: They kill, and cannot say why. So they are destroyed, for the greater good.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 115069bc-f214-7992-6cd5-158a2f379345Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: he3d72748ge051g4627g8214g035adb33722dText UUID: 485e9394-00a7-43c5-9b1e-cc5320108b72Group ID: 0dea0ddf-9fac-d68b-49f8-bda43683071bGroup Index: 2
                      • +
                        512.Minthara: When you speak to me of yearning and urges to kill, I fear you are like them - controlled by a bloodlust that you do not comprehend.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f9b1f492-5a36-e588-2870-113a541b107cSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h089dae77gf47cg40fagbd46g0319b8d55939Text UUID: 42c6a735-8c22-4e5e-bfe8-f73f0079f8e3Group ID: 0dea0ddf-9fac-d68b-49f8-bda43683071bGroup Index: 3
                        • +
                          96.Player: You misunderstand. I enjoy killing, but I can control myself.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2e3f656f-7b4e-4401-6bb6-162118a416c0Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hf1223f3fg1e27g4603g8a46gba98b5c3ffe2Text UUID: 7c6cda04-bc5e-477d-8018-d84120c80147Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 8fdbe58d-acc2-4784-8f8f-d005976f4abd
                          • +
                            68.Minthara: Killing is necessary. It is good that you can take pleasure in it.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1fc7299a-c5c5-cea1-06da-108cf9b20980Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h8beac24fg437dg4e3dg9ea5gb5ee1096a0e1Text UUID: 099efda2-bde8-45d1-a6d3-3d271ae9b449Timeline Phase Index: 169Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1fc7299a-c5c5-cea1-06da-108cf9b20980Timeline Phase Duration: 19.77sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1493.07s-1500.17s] | @ 1495.03s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1493.07s-1500.17s] | @ 1497.48s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [1500.17s-1508.23s] | @ 1500.28s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [1500.17s-1508.23s] | @ 1502.46s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1500.17s-1508.23s] | @ 1504.52s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1500.17s-1508.23s] | @ 1506.15s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 3 [1508.23s-1512.84s] | @ 1508.4s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 3 [1508.23s-1512.84s] | @ 1508.55s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 3 [1508.23s-1512.84s] | @ 1508.68s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 10: Shot 3 [1508.23s-1512.84s] | @ 1508.8s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 11: Shot 3 [1508.23s-1512.84s] | @ 1509.17s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 12: Shot 3 [1508.23s-1512.84s] | @ 1510.9s | speaker 1 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 13: Shot 3 [1508.23s-1512.84s] | @ 1511.04s | peanut slot 0 | Angry (8) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 14: Shot 3 [1508.23s-1512.84s] | @ 1511.21s | peanut slot 2 | Angry (8) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 15: Shot 3 [1508.23s-1512.84s] | @ 1511.47s | peanut slot 1 | Angry (8) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 16: Shot 3 [1508.23s-1512.84s] | @ 1512.35s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Group ID: 1fc7299a-c5c5-cea1-06da-108cf9b20980Group Index: 0
                            • +
                              238.Minthara: Just be sure that your urges do not lead you astray - we have enemies enough for you to sate your lusts on.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 76bf6aa3-9ab4-1db4-d70e-6883446140e1Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h3a44d76ag7be7g4f07gbdcaga322d68de807Text UUID: 81ecd9f3-bc1f-44c4-9b50-e75b5e291fd2Group ID: 1fc7299a-c5c5-cea1-06da-108cf9b20980Group Index: 1
                              • •
                                169.Minthara: We do not need to make more because you indulge your every murderous whim. [End]

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 516ac526-bdc4-bb92-8f1d-efc6a8790730Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h88cdfcc7g4f56g4882gb0bcg19e9b4761530Text UUID: 9a4fa9bf-36d5-45b0-b2f4-6ae631998a53End Node: TrueGroup ID: 1fc7299a-c5c5-cea1-06da-108cf9b20980Group Index: 2
                        • +
                          370.Player: If that were the case, what would you do?

                          Metadata

                          • +
                            264.Minthara: I would kill you without hesitation.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8497d832-aab0-bed2-a7b7-207cdf474286Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hd97a712bg93dbg4f22ga121g169a7e2728c8Text UUID: 4f6fecca-c332-4e09-80c3-8e95be13801cTimeline Phase Index: 40Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8497d832-aab0-bed2-a7b7-207cdf474286Timeline Phase Duration: 2.29sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [326.8s-329.09s] | @ 327.01s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [326.8s-329.09s] | @ 327.01s | speaker 1 | Sad (32) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [326.8s-329.09s] | @ 327.32s | peanut slot 0 | Sad (32) | variation 2 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [326.8s-329.09s] | @ 327.56s | peanut slot 2 | Sad (32) | variation 2 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [326.8s-329.09s] | @ 327.91s | peanut slot 1 | Sad (32) | variation 2 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [326.8s-329.09s] | @ 328.19s | speaker 0 | Sad (32) | variation 1

                                332.Minthara: If it ever takes you, I will be there to put you down. [End]

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a561736a-56a3-52a9-ace4-9ff3717fd447Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h63e8efd9g48dfg447ag8640g8190abb517f9Text UUID: 4a6433f1-ccb9-4921-a6a7-c9c023b05116Timeline Phase Index: 170Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a561736a-56a3-52a9-ace4-9ff3717fd447Timeline Phase Duration: 5.67sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1512.84s-1515.2s] | @ 1513.08s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1512.84s-1515.2s] | @ 1513.23s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1512.84s-1515.2s] | @ 1513.27s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1512.84s-1515.2s] | @ 1513.32s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1512.84s-1515.2s] | @ 1513.72s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1512.84s-1515.2s] | @ 1513.73s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [1512.84s-1515.2s] | @ 1513.83s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [1512.84s-1515.2s] | @ 1514.64s | speaker 1 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 1 [1512.84s-1515.2s] | @ 1514.88s | peanut slot 0 | Sad (32) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 10: Shot 2 [1515.2s-1518.51s] | @ 1515.35s | peanut slot 1 | Sad (32) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 11: Shot 2 [1515.2s-1518.51s] | @ 1515.37s | peanut slot 2 | Sad (32) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 12: Shot 2 [1515.2s-1518.51s] | @ 1515.46s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 13: Shot 2 [1515.2s-1518.51s] | @ 1517.2s | speaker 0 | Sad (32) | variation 1End Node: True

                          377.Player: I fear it may be true.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: bcf01194-10a0-8b85-d8b6-271f4e87f799Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: he936d798g6261g4043g9580gefc56a732617Text UUID: d8b4673a-ec8e-43b6-9c81-e5367a18300aShow Once: TrueApproval Rating: e010da93-0e46-472e-bc3b-75ba66ff4421
                          • +
                            435.Minthara: If it is, then your own death may be the only cure.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d4a3adc5-8c59-7143-7167-932c69ca6bf6Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hb9d131c1ga03fg45a0gaa31g958e3301cf18Text UUID: 00723db5-2fcd-4cde-b9c2-a13d3079e1b3Timeline Phase Index: 84Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d4a3adc5-8c59-7143-7167-932c69ca6bf6Timeline Phase Duration: 4.87sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [592.71s-597.58s] | @ 592.87s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [592.71s-597.58s] | @ 594.95s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [592.71s-597.58s] | @ 596.51s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [597.58s-598.86s] | @ 597.58s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)
                            • +
                              7.Minthara: But for you to even speak of this to me shows that if there is a madness in you, it does not own you yet.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 045d4d97-2282-4c6a-bd7b-18acc62811b5Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hc6203400g28c4g4282g804cg6aca87b12b14Text UUID: b3c49b41-b2df-4672-a489-12b48a670a99Timeline Phase Index: 108Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 045d4d97-2282-4c6a-bd7b-18acc62811b5Timeline Phase Duration: 8.83sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [823.12s-831.95s] | @ 823.4s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [823.12s-831.95s] | @ 825.88s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [823.12s-831.95s] | @ 827.39s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [823.12s-831.95s] | @ 829.79s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1
                              • •
                                15.Minthara: If it ever does, I will kill you without hesitation. [End]

              335.Player: I trust you.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a657811b-f29e-2fba-8e97-affcc675c72bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hcd30d7b2g7bc6g4ac4g9e1dg399cb4e12312Text UUID: 34f82829-ddda-4dbe-9b92-3d8e2dc73043Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 90363b7b-fecd-4056-8a5f-c9349f87ce04
              • +
                11.Minthara: As you should. But I am not sure that I can trust you.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 056ec31d-a8b4-8c87-8099-b17d848c2be4Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hdbe615fdg8520g4662ga241gac0987195606Text UUID: 6a82cede-0478-4ec8-b8a3-127d660d7e22Timeline Phase Index: 110Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 056ec31d-a8b4-8c87-8099-b17d848c2be4Timeline Phase Duration: 4.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [855.92s-860.42s] | @ 856.03s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [855.92s-860.42s] | @ 857.59s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [855.92s-860.42s] | @ 859.24s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
                • See Node 21 (Minthara) There are those within Menzoberranzan that we call qu'lith quarthen - those driven-by-blood.
            • +
              347.Player: I need help. I thought you might have experience with violent urges.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: abc2840c-97ef-59cc-9a11-038aab4d6204Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h6b2620ceg0a0dg49abg84bcg0405d4cc67fcText UUID: 111d50ce-62a8-42cd-8f21-3bcf6a91e3ceShow Once: True
              • +
                163.Minthara: I do not have violent urges, I have violent intentions.

                Metadata

                • +
                  77.Minthara: If somebody angers me, I hurt them not because I lose control of my temper, but because it teaches them not to anger me again.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 249db545-83ee-f1bf-b52f-eac6944e2786Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h6cad5504ge964g433bgaf1ag9644c53652ecText UUID: e3e54b6b-d1ab-4634-b54b-a88a8e6bd1aaGroup ID: 4d714509-85b5-e0f1-12c7-1e4de776328aGroup Index: 1
                  • +
                    261.Minthara: If somebody causes me sorrow, I remove their ability to do so again. If that involves removing their head, so be it.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 83056032-2ae5-592a-c1ee-f0b691757c57Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h8b6de13cg4dd1g4deeg80e7g7aa38f0d2a05Text UUID: 89006a76-6d10-4406-93fe-ed07342a4877Group ID: 4d714509-85b5-e0f1-12c7-1e4de776328aGroup Index: 2
                    • +
                      47.Minthara: But I do not lash out or strike without reason.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 16df79b0-b37a-8616-bc0e-b9eb71e6b40dSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hceffcf5fg1787g484ag8817gc949ba01e238Text UUID: b97d0263-a300-4add-8279-959f7fb73ff9Group ID: 4d714509-85b5-e0f1-12c7-1e4de776328aGroup Index: 3
                      • •
